description: The world-building context of a narrative, encompassing time, place, society, and overarching worldview.

name.description: A label or short identifier for this setting

setting_type.description: The primary domain of the setting

description.description: A narrative description of the setting's atmosphere and defining features

time_period.description: The historical era, season, or time frame in which the story takes place

location.description: The geographical or spatial context of the narrative

mood.description: The emotional tone or atmosphere evoked by this setting
